headline: Super Micro Computer Rises 5%: 3 Reasons Bulls Are Looking Past the Lawsuits
summary: Super Micro Computer (NASDAQ:SMCI) shares rose 5% on Tuesday, trading around $22.20 after opening at $21.06. The move comes after a prolonged decline that had left SMCI shares down 28.05% year to date and 38.53% over the past year. The backdrop is anything but clean. headline: HPE Security And AI Push Raises Questions On Value And Growth Potential
summary: Hewlett Packard Enterprise (NYSE:HPE) announced new security and AI infrastructure offerings focused on AI governance, post quantum cryptography, and confidential computing. The company introduced tools for AI usage monitoring, machine unlearning integration, and extended carrier grade security features at the edge. HPE also outlined new collaborations, including a national AI Experience Center aimed at enabling scalable, privacy focused AI deployments for public sector clients. For...

headline: ‘Uninvestable’ Super Micro sends investors racing to the exits
summary: (Bloomberg) -- On paper, Super Micro Computer Inc. is the type of company that Wall Street can’t get enough of, with soaring sales, an enviable list of partners like Nvidia Corp. and its placement at the center of the artificial intelligence boom.
